creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 167837
patch with update to 3.15.0.314

Hello,

attached a patch to bring the port to version 3.15.0.314. This version is required to get the new port www/gitlab running.

poudriere build fine for:
9.3 amd + i386
10.1 amd + i386
10.2 amd + i386
11-current r293820 amd + i386

portlint is also fine.

And i did a runtime test to verify that the port is still loadable and usable!

Greetings,
Torsten
